places.name: Hassan II Mosque
places.description: An awe-inspiring mosque in Morocco with one of the tallest minarets in the world.

places.name: 'Tire Lion'
places.description: The rubbery beast is sculpted from recycled materials.

places.name: La Sqala
places.description: This restaurant sits within the walls of an 18th-century fortification that once defended the city’s old quarter.

places.name: Rick’s Café Casablanca
places.description: A recreation of the bar from the classic 1942 movie “Casablanca.”
